notes: No personal drop bags — all Maurten must be carried from the start.

staples.maurten_sachets_note: 1 pre-race + 2 pre-mixed in 500 ml soft flasks + 4 dry sachets carried in vest. Mix on the fly at aid stations with still water.

Savognin (Start).carry_out: 2× 500 ml flask pre-mixed Maurten 320 (= 2 sachets, 160 g) + 4 dry Maurten sachets in vest + 3 bars (~90 g) + 3 gels (~75 g)
Savognin (Start).consume_here: Pre-race: 1 Maurten 320 bottle + banana + bread w/ honey

Castelas.carry_out: Keep flasks + sachets as-is (first flask still half full)

Alp Flix.carry_out: Mix dry sachet #1 in empty flask with still water (80 g refill)
Alp Flix.consume_here: Banana + orange + handful salted nuts. ~3 min stop.

La Veduta.carry_out: Mix dry sachet #2 in other empty flask (80 g refill)
La Veduta.consume_here: Big refuel before Septimer push: potato + cheese + banana + 1 own gel.

Septimerpass.carry_out: Mix dry sachet #3 in empty flask with still water (80 g for the long leg to Bivio)
Septimerpass.consume_here: Bouillon shot + 1 own gel. No food on station — eat a carried bar on the climb out.

Bivio.carry_out: Mix dry sachet #4 (last sachet) in 1 flask — enough Maurten to reach the finish
Bivio.consume_here: PASTA stop — full plate + banana + bouillon + cola. Sit max 3 min.

Sur.carry_out: Top up 1 flask with isotonic (no Maurten left — use own gels/bars from here)

Rona.carry_out: Top up 1 flask with cola or water (only 8.9 km left)
